steps.title: Write Maya total
steps.content:
If $x$ is the notebook price and $y$ is the folder price, Maya's purchase gives
$$5x+3y=71$$

steps.title: Write Omar total
steps.content:
Omar's purchase gives
$$2x+6y=86$$Together, the system is
$$5x+3y=71\quad \text{and}\quad 2x+6y=86$$The answer is A.
